# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repository:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: your-s3-bucket-name
      region: your-region
      access_key: your-access-key
      secret_key: your-secret-key
      base_path: elasticsearch-snapshots
  file_share:
    type: fs
    settings:
      location: /mount/backups/elasticsearch
      compress: true

automated_backup:
  schedule: "0 0 * * *" # Daily at midnight
  snapshot_name: "snapshot_{{now/d}}"
  repository: s3
  indices: "*"
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: false

restore:
  snapshot_name: "snapshot_to_restore"
  repository: s3
  indices: "*"
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: true
  rename_pattern: "index_(.+)"
  rename_replacement: "restored_index_$1"
